2.message:
🚨 ROLE VERIFICATION — QUICK CHECKLIST 🚨


✅ Send proofs here <#1414920625000288317>  (only if you don’t yet have the Liqquidation Nation role inside Alpha Intel):
- UID
- Screenshot of USDT Balance
- Screenshot of “My Referrer” (optional, helps with faster verification)

Already have an account? Here’s how to make a new one easily:
📧 Email Trick
Use your same email but add +1, +2, +3 …
Example:
liquidationnation@gmail.com → liquidationnation+1@gmail.com

🪪 ID Usage
- You can use the same ID you submitted earlier, up to three times.

⚠️ Note:
If you already hold the Liquidation Nation role inside Alpha Intel, you do not need to submit proofs here.
This verification is only for those who don’t yet have the LN role and may be confused.

@everyone
